# PlateSync

> The family meal planner that knows what everyone needs.

PlateSync builds weekly meal plans with per-person portions based on each family member's health profile — age, weight, activity level, fitness goals, and dietary needs. It calculates exactly how many servings of each recipe go on each plate, generates a shopping list based on what you actually need to buy, and provides a mobile cooking guide with step-by-step instructions.

## Key Features
- Per-person portion calculation using Mifflin-St Jeor BMR + protein targets
- Day-aware nutrition (training days get more, rest days less)
- AI recipe discovery and cataloguing from the web
- Cooking mode with checkable ingredients and portion guidance
- Leftovers tracking (fridge, freeze, or use for another meal)
- Smart shopping lists with full-batch amounts and pantry deduction
- Allergy detection across family members
- Household sharing (multiple users, shared data)

## Links
- App: https://app.getplatesync.com
- Website: https://getplatesync.com
- Built by: High Country Digital (https://highcountry.digital)
